metadata.description: Production-tested iOS Agent Skills — 8 enterprise-grade skills covering SwiftUI MVVM, UIKit MVVM, VIPER, TCA, Swift Concurrency, GCD, Testing, and Security Audit.

plugins.name: ios-all
plugins.description: All 8 iOS skills: swiftui-mvvm, uikit-mvvm, viper-uikit, tca-swiftui, swift-concurrency, gcd-operations, ios-testing, ios-security.

plugins.name: swiftui-mvvm
plugins.description: SwiftUI MVVM architecture with @Observable (iOS 17+). Use when creating SwiftUI screens, migrating from ObservableObject, setting up Router navigation, or writing ViewModel tests.

plugins.name: uikit-mvvm
plugins.description: UIKit MVVM architecture with Combine (iOS 13+). Use when refactoring MVC to MVVM, setting up Coordinators, implementing Combine bindings, or adopting DiffableDataSource.

plugins.name: viper-uikit
plugins.description: UIKit VIPER architecture (iOS 13+). Use when building VIPER modules, decomposing god ViewControllers, fixing retain cycles, or testing Presenters/Interactors.

plugins.name: tca-swiftui
plugins.description: The Composable Architecture with SwiftUI (iOS 16+, TCA 1.7+). Use when building @Reducer features, writing TestStore tests, or migrating legacy TCA code.

plugins.name: swift-concurrency
plugins.description: Swift Concurrency (iOS 13+). Use when writing async/await, diagnosing data races, fixing actor isolation, migrating to Swift 6, or handling Sendable conformance.

plugins.name: gcd-operations
plugins.description: GCD & OperationQueue (iOS 13+). Use when writing DispatchQueue code, fixing deadlocks, preventing thread explosion, or migrating GCD to Swift Concurrency.

plugins.name: ios-testing
plugins.description: iOS Testing across all architectures. Use when writing tests, migrating XCTest to Swift Testing, diagnosing flaky tests, or auditing coverage.

plugins.name: ios-security
plugins.description: iOS Security Audit against OWASP MASVS v2.1.0. Use when reviewing code for vulnerabilities, auditing Keychain usage, checking ATS, or mapping compliance.
